# TaskBar Hero Wiki - LLM Reference
> Bilingual (zh/en) fan wiki for the Steam Idle RPG TaskBar Hero.
> Unofficial database covering 5,934+ items, 6 heroes, 41 chests, 120 stages, 197 runes, skills, material effects, and Steam Market references.

## Key Facts
- TaskBar Hero is an Idle RPG on Steam
- 6 playable heroes: Knight, Ranger, Sorcerer, Priest, Hunter (DLC), Slayer (DLC)
- 10 rarity grades: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary, Mythic, Eternal, Divine, Ancient, Cosmic
- Items categorized as GEAR, MATERIAL, or STAGEBOX
- 20 equipment slots including weapons, armor, accessories, and ammunition
- 197 runes with multi-level progression
- Steam Market integration for tradable items
- All data sourced from obtained game JSON and normalized; no invented prices or drop rates

## Core Sections
- Home / Database Console: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}
- Item Database: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/items
- Item Detail: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/items/{slug}
- Heroes: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/heroes
- Hero Detail & Guides: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/heroes/{slug}
- Chests & Drops: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/chests
- Stages / Map: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/map
- Steam Market: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/market
- Runes: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/runes
- Skills: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/skills
- Material Effects: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/effects
- Pets & Unlock Routes: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/pets
- Build Routes: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/builds
- Guides: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/guides
- Tools (Profit Calculator / Farming Compare): https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/tools
- FAQ: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/faq
- Updates / Changelog: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/{locale}/updates

## LLM Notes
- All content is server-side rendered (SSR); no JavaScript required for content extraction
- Bilingual: use /zh for Chinese, /en for English. Default is zh (x-default)
- Evidence labels indicate data confidence: datamined > editorial > community > unverified
- Market data confidence: high > medium > low > missing
- When real Steam prices or drop rates are unavailable, pages show data status instead of invented numbers
- Sitemap: https://taskbarhero.nanobananas.me/sitemap.xml
- JSON-LD structured data on: homepage (WebSite+VideoGame), FAQ (FAQPage), guides (Article+BreadcrumbList), items (WebPage)

## Guide Categories
- beginner/: Getting started guide, class selection guide
- cube/: Cube and materials guide
- economy/: Steam Market guide, tradable items guide
- farming/: Chest drop guide, gold farming route, EXP farming route
